---
title: "Tree_sampling"
author: "Wouter Strauven"
date: "2026-06-23"
output: html_document
---

0. Setup
```{r setup}
# Libraries
library(terra)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

```

1. Read stratification layers
```{r}
# Read in stratification layers
LCZ <- rast("Output/LCZ_3classes.tif")
OSM <- rast("Output/OSM_raster_10m.tif")

# Inspect
LCZ
OSM
crs(LCZ)
crs(OSM)

# Fix crs
crs(OSM) <- "EPSG:31370"
OSM <- project(OSM, LCZ)

# Provide unique names for columns
names(LCZ) <- "LCZ_class"
names(OSM) <- "OSM_class"

```

2. Read tree layers per city and unify into one dataset
```{r}
# --- 1. Read tree layers ---

# Brussel (2 layers)
brussel_mobil_trees <- vect("F:/KULeuven/BRANCH/Materials_and_methods/Data/In-situ_data/1_Municipal_inventories/Brussels/trees_2026_BrusselMobiliteit.gpkg")

brussel_stad_trees  <- vect("F:/KULeuven/BRANCH/Materials_and_methods/Data/In-situ_data/1_Municipal_inventories/Brussels/arbres-bomen-vbx-be-bm_2026_StadBrussel.geojson")
brussel_stad_trees <- disagg(brussel_stad_trees) # Fix multi-point (ID 709 = 3 geometries --> VERIFY!!)

# Hasselt
hasselt_trees <- vect("F:/KULeuven/BRANCH/Materials_and_methods/Data/In-situ_data/1_Municipal_inventories/Hasselt/Hasselt_Runkst.gpkg")

# Liège
liege_trees <- vect("F:/KULeuven/BRANCH/Materials_and_methods/Data/In-situ_data/1_Municipal_inventories/Liege/arbustum.geojson")

# Leuven
leuven_trees <- vect("F:/KULeuven/BRANCH/Materials_and_methods/Data/In-situ_data/1_Municipal_inventories/Leuven/Boomvorm.shp")

# --- 2. Check that all layers match the Belgian Lambert 72 CRQ ---
# Inspect CRS
crs(brussel_mobil_trees)
crs(brussel_stad_trees)
crs(hasselt_trees)
crs(liege_trees)
crs(leuven_trees)

# Reproject to Belgian Lambert 72 (same CRS as LCZ)
brussel_mobil_trees <- project(brussel_mobil_trees, LCZ)
brussel_stad_trees <- project(brussel_stad_trees, LCZ)
hasselt_trees <- project(hasselt_trees, LCZ)
liege_trees <- project(liege_trees, LCZ)
leuven_trees <- project(leuven_trees, LCZ)

# --- 3. Unify species column names and bind cities into one dataset---
# Inspect column names
names(brussel_mobil_trees)
names(brussel_stad_trees)
names(hasselt_trees)
names(liege_trees)
names(leuven_trees)

# Unify species columns and add city column
brussel_stad_trees$species_raw <- brussel_stad_trees$species
brussel_stad_trees$city <- "Brussels"

brussel_mobil_trees$species_raw <- brussel_mobil_trees$essence
brussel_mobil_trees$city <- "Brussels"

hasselt_trees$species_raw <- hasselt_trees$boomsoor
hasselt_trees$city <- "Hasselt"

liege_trees$species_raw <- liege_trees$tree_species
liege_trees$city <- "Liege"

leuven_trees$species_raw <- leuven_trees$wetenschap
leuven_trees$city <- "Leuven"

# Bind cities into one dataset
trees_all <- rbind(
  brussel_stad_trees,
  brussel_mobil_trees,
  hasselt_trees,
  liege_trees,
  leuven_trees
)

# Inspect
names(trees_all)
head(trees_all$species_raw)
```

3. Extract genus (VERIFY!!)
```{r}
extract_genus <- function(vect) {
  vect$genus <- vect$species_raw |>
    as.character() |>
    stringr::str_trim() |>
    stringr::str_split_fixed(" ", n = 2) |>
    (\(m) m[,1])()
  
  vect
}

# Apply to merged dataset
trees_all <- extract_genus(trees_all)

# Apply to each city
brussel_stad_trees  <- extract_genus(brussel_stad_trees)
brussel_mobil_trees <- extract_genus(brussel_mobil_trees)
hasselt_trees       <- extract_genus(hasselt_trees)
liege_trees         <- extract_genus(liege_trees)
leuven_trees        <- extract_genus(leuven_trees)

```

4. Extract OSM and LCZ for each tree
```{r}
# Robust extraction function
extract_LCZ_OSM <- function(vect, LCZ, OSM) {
  
  # 1. Reproject to LCZ CRS
  vect <- project(vect, LCZ)
  
  # 2. Extract LCZ and OSM values
  lcz_vals <- terra::extract(LCZ, vect)[, "LCZ_class", drop = TRUE]
  osm_vals <- terra::extract(OSM, vect)[, "OSM_class", drop = TRUE]
  
  # 3. Attach to vector
  vect$LCZ_class <- lcz_vals
  vect$OSM_class <- osm_vals
  
  vect
}

# Apply to merged dataset
trees_all <- extract_LCZ_OSM(trees_all, LCZ, OSM)

# Apply to each city
brussel_stad_trees_extracted  <- extract_LCZ_OSM(brussel_stad_trees,  LCZ, OSM)
brussel_mobil_trees_extracted <- extract_LCZ_OSM(brussel_mobil_trees, LCZ, OSM)
hasselt_trees_extracted       <- extract_LCZ_OSM(hasselt_trees,       LCZ, OSM)
liege_trees_extracted         <- extract_LCZ_OSM(liege_trees,         LCZ, OSM)
leuven_trees_extracted        <- extract_LCZ_OSM(leuven_trees,        LCZ, OSM)


```

5. Statistics
```{r}
# Convert to data.frame for dplyr (keeping geometry in terra object)
trees_df <- as.data.frame(trees_all, geom = "XY")

# --- LCZ distribution ---
lcz_stats <- trees_df %>%
  count(LCZ_class, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / sum(n))

lcz_stats


# --- OSM distribution ---
osm_stats <- trees_df %>%
  count(OSM_class, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / sum(n))

osm_stats


# --- Genus counts overall ---
genus_stats <- trees_df %>%
  count(genus, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

head(genus_stats, 30)


# --- Genus by city ---
genus_city_stats <- trees_df %>%
  count(city, genus, name = "n") %>%
  group_by(city) %>%
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

head(genus_city_stats, 30)


# --- Genus by LCZ and OSM (large table) ---
genus_lcz_osm_stats <- trees_df %>%
  count(genus, LCZ_class, OSM_class, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(genus, LCZ_class, OSM_class)

head(genus_lcz_osm_stats, 30)

```
6. Sampling
```{r}

### Main sampling function ###
library(terra)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(rlang)

sample_trees <- function(
  trees_all,
  seed = 1234,
  n_stad_ronde1  = 200,
  n_stad_ronde2  = 50,
  n_totaal_ronde1 = 800,
  n_totaal_ronde2 = 200,
  n_min_genus = 5,
  use_strata = TRUE,
  strata_vars = c("LCZ_class", "OSM_class"),
  strata_mode = c("proportional", "equal")
) {
  set.seed(seed)
  strata_mode <- match.arg(strata_mode)
  if (!inherits(trees_all, "SpatVector")) stop("trees_all must be a SpatVector")
  if (!"ID" %in% names(trees_all)) trees_all$ID <- seq_len(nrow(trees_all))
  if (!"sample_round" %in% names(trees_all)) trees_all$sample_round <- 0L

  # build strata on df side
  df_all <- as.data.frame(trees_all)
  if (use_strata) {
    missing_vars <- setdiff(strata_vars, names(df_all))
    if (length(missing_vars) > 0) stop("Missing strata variables: ", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "))
    df_all <- df_all %>% mutate(strata = interaction(!!!syms(strata_vars), drop = TRUE))
  } else {
    df_all <- df_all %>% mutate(strata = factor("all"))
  }
  trees_all$strata <- df_all$strata

  # helpers
  compute_city_capacity <- function(df, n_per_city) {
    df %>% count(city, name = "n_current") %>%
      mutate(capacity = pmax(n_per_city - n_current, 0L)) %>%
      select(city, capacity)
  }

  safe_slice_sample <- function(df, n) {
    # ensure n is scalar
    if (length(n) > 1) n <- n[1]
    if (is.na(n) || n <= 0) return(df[0, , drop = FALSE])
    n_avail <- nrow(df)
    if (n_avail == 0) return(df[0, , drop = FALSE])
    n_draw <- min(n, n_avail)
    df %>% slice_sample(n = n_draw)
  }

  df <- as.data.frame(trees_all)

  # ROUND 1: minimum per genus (respect city caps)
  city_cap_r1 <- tibble(city = unique(df$city), capacity = n_stad_ronde1)
  selected_ids_r1 <- integer(0)
  genera <- unique(df$genus)
  total_selected <- 0L

  for (g in genera) {
    if (total_selected >= n_totaal_ronde1) break
    cand <- df %>% filter(sample_round == 0, genus == g)
    if (nrow(cand) == 0) next
    cand <- cand %>% left_join(city_cap_r1, by = "city") %>% filter(capacity > 0)
    if (nrow(cand) == 0) next
    n_target <- min(n_min_genus, nrow(cand), n_totaal_ronde1 - total_selected)
    if (n_target <= 0) next
    s <- cand %>% slice_sample(n = n_target)
    selected_ids_r1 <- c(selected_ids_r1, s$ID)
    used <- s %>% count(city, name = "used")
    city_cap_r1 <- city_cap_r1 %>%
      left_join(used, by = "city") %>%
      mutate(used = replace_na(used, 0L),
             capacity = pmax(capacity - used, 0L)) %>%
      select(city, capacity)
    total_selected <- length(selected_ids_r1)
  }

  trees_all$sample_round[trees_all$ID %in% selected_ids_r1] <- 1L
  df <- as.data.frame(trees_all)

  # ROUND 1: fill remaining slots (stratified or random), respecting city caps
  remaining_slots_r1 <- max(n_totaal_ronde1 - sum(df$sample_round == 1), 0)
  if (remaining_slots_r1 > 0) {
    city_cap_r1 <- compute_city_capacity(df %>% filter(sample_round == 1), n_stad_ronde1)
    pool <- df %>% filter(sample_round == 0) %>% left_join(city_cap_r1, by = "city") %>% filter(capacity > 0)
    if (nrow(pool) > 0) {
      if (use_strata) {
        pool_counts <- pool %>% count(strata, name = "n_stratum")
        if (strata_mode == "proportional") {
          pool_counts <- pool_counts %>%
            mutate(alloc = pmax(1, round(n_stratum / sum(n_stratum) * remaining_slots_r1)))
        } else { # equal
          n_strata <- n_distinct(pool$strata)
          per_stratum <- ceiling(remaining_slots_r1 / n_strata)
          pool_counts <- pool_counts %>% mutate(alloc = per_stratum)
        }
        # join alloc back to pool and sample per group using scalar alloc
        pool <- pool %>% left_join(pool_counts %>% select(strata, alloc), by = "strata")
        picks <- pool %>% group_by(strata) %>%
          group_modify(~ safe_slice_sample(.x, unique(.x$alloc))) %>%
          ungroup()
      } else {
        picks <- safe_slice_sample(pool, remaining_slots_r1)
      }
      ids_r1_extra <- picks$ID
      trees_all$sample_round[trees_all$ID %in% ids_r1_extra] <- 1L
      df <- as.data.frame(trees_all)
    }
  }

  # ROUND 2: per-city extra caps
  df <- as.data.frame(trees_all)
  pool2 <- df %>% filter(sample_round == 0)
  if (nrow(pool2) > 0 && n_totaal_ronde2 > 0) {
    city_cap_r2 <- tibble(city = unique(df$city)) %>% mutate(capacity = n_stad_ronde2)
    pool2 <- pool2 %>% left_join(city_cap_r2, by = "city") %>% filter(capacity > 0)
    if (nrow(pool2) > 0) {
      remaining_slots_r2 <- n_totaal_ronde2
      if (use_strata) {
        pool2_counts <- pool2 %>% count(strata, name = "n_stratum")
        if (strata_mode == "proportional") {
          pool2_counts <- pool2_counts %>% mutate(alloc = pmax(1, round(n_stratum / sum(n_stratum) * remaining_slots_r2)))
        } else {
          n_strata <- n_distinct(pool2$strata)
          per_stratum <- ceiling(remaining_slots_r2 / n_strata)
          pool2_counts <- pool2_counts %>% mutate(alloc = per_stratum)
        }
        pool2 <- pool2 %>% left_join(pool2_counts %>% select(strata, alloc), by = "strata")
        picks2 <- pool2 %>% group_by(strata) %>%
          group_modify(~ safe_slice_sample(.x, unique(.x$alloc))) %>%
          ungroup()
      } else {
        picks2 <- safe_slice_sample(pool2, remaining_slots_r2)
      }
      ids_r2 <- picks2$ID
      trees_all$sample_round[trees_all$ID %in% ids_r2] <- 2L
      df <- as.data.frame(trees_all)
    }
  }

  # Summaries
  df_final <- as.data.frame(trees_all)
  summary_by_city <- df_final %>%
    count(city, sample_round) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = sample_round, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
    rename(not_sampled = `0`, round1 = `1`, round2 = `2`)
  summary_by_genus <- df_final %>%
    count(genus, sample_round) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = sample_round, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
    rename(not_sampled = `0`, round1 = `1`, round2 = `2`) %>%
    arrange(desc(round1 + round2))
  summary_by_strata <- df_final %>%
    count(strata, sample_round) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = sample_round, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
    rename(not_sampled = `0`, round1 = `1`, round2 = `2`)

  list(
    trees = trees_all,
    df = df_final,
    summary_by_city = summary_by_city,
    summary_by_genus = summary_by_genus,
    summary_by_strata = summary_by_strata
  )
}


### Using the function ###
res <- sample_trees(
  trees_all,
  seed = 1234,
  n_stad_ronde1 = 200,
  n_stad_ronde2 = 50,
  n_totaal_ronde1 = 800,
  n_totaal_ronde2 = 200,
  n_min_genus = 5,
  use_strata = TRUE,
  strata_vars = c("LCZ_class", "OSM_class"),
  strata_mode = "proportional" # equal or proportional
)

# Updated SpatVector
trees_all_sampled <- res$trees

# Quick checks
table(as.data.frame(trees_all_sampled)$sample_round)
res$summary_by_city
res$summary_by_genus
res$summary_by_strata


```


7. Export
```{r}
#### CSV ####
# Create function
export_city <- function(vect, name, folder = "exports") {
  if (!dir.exists(folder)) dir.create(folder)
  
  # Convert to data.frame with XY columns
  df <- as.data.frame(vect, geom = "XY")
  
  # Build filename
  file <- file.path(folder, paste0(name, ".csv"))
  
  # Write CSV
  write.csv(df, file, row.names = FALSE)
  
  message("Exported: ", file)
}

# Export combined dataset
export_city(trees_all, "trees_all")

city_list <- list(
  brussel_stad  = brussel_stad_trees_extracted,
  brussel_mobil = brussel_mobil_trees_extracted,
  hasselt       = hasselt_trees_extracted,
  liege         = liege_trees_extracted,
  leuven        = leuven_trees_extracted
)

# Export separate cities
lapply(names(city_list), function(n) export_city(city_list[[n]], n))

#### geopackage ####
# Create function
export_city_gpkg <- function(vect, name, folder = "exports") {
  if (!dir.exists(folder)) dir.create(folder)
  
  file <- file.path(folder, paste0(name, ".gpkg"))
  
  # Write as GeoPackage
  writeVector(vect, file, overwrite = TRUE)
  
  message("Exported spatial file: ", file)
}

# Export combined dataset
export_city_gpkg(trees_all, "trees_all")

# Export separate cities
city_list <- list(
  brussel_stad  = brussel_stad_trees_extracted,
  brussel_mobil = brussel_mobil_trees_extracted,
  hasselt       = hasselt_trees_extracted,
  liege         = liege_trees_extracted,
  leuven        = leuven_trees_extracted
)

lapply(names(city_list), function(n)
  export_city_gpkg(city_list[[n]], n)
)



```
